summary:
Baricitinib has been shown through clinical trials to promote hair regrowth in adults with severe alopecia areata. The U.S. Food and Drug Administration has granted it approval specifically for treating severe cases of alopecia areata, affirming its proven effectiveness and clinical value.  

Note that I have not included any information about side effects or risks because they were outside the scope of the original query which focused solely on whether baricitinib is effective.
